notes: A focused 13-declaration file that proves the invariant-differential pullback coefficient is stable under field base change (Silverman III.5), serving as the differential analogue of finrank base change. All proofs are sorry-free and axiom-clean; the three synthInstance.maxHeartbeats overrides (all 1000000, no comments) reflect instance-search pressure from the KaehlerDifferential.map square. The capstone theorem omegaPullbackCoeff_baseChangePullback is a key external API used by PencilSeparable, OneSubComapConcrete, and PencilComapWitnesses to discharge the OmegaBaseChangeNeZero hypothesis.
